Services Overview

Transform Data intoBusiness Intelligence

Define, Analyze, Visualize, Explore, and Transform your data into actionable insights

From strategy to execution, our comprehensive service portfolio delivers measurable business impact through AI-first solutions

Powered by agility

Speed with precision for fast-moving digital businesses.

At ConglomerateIT, we combine speed with precision to deliver innovative tech solutions tailored to your needs. Our agile team leverages cutting-edge technology to ensure rapid, high-quality results that keep you ahead of competition.

What we do

Powering innovation with cutting-edge IT services and agile IT models.

The original site presents six service pillars and six delivery models. Here they are reframed as a clearer buyer journey from strategy to execution.

QA / QE

Quality Assurance & Engineering

Functional testing, functional automation, non-functional testing, and observability for reliable software delivery.

Learn more

Infrastructure

On-Premises, Cloud & Core Services

Compute, backup, storage, operating systems, network, network security, AWS, Azure, GCP, migration, DDI, Active Directory, and FTP.

Learn more

Software Development

Web, Backend & Mobile

Custom websites, portals, web applications, APIs, server-side systems, database engineering, and mobile applications.

Learn more

Business Transformation

Enterprise Platforms

Salesforce, ServiceNow, Workday, and Databricks implementation, customization, integration, and ongoing support.

Learn more

Data, Digital & Analytics

Data Strategy to Governance

Define, analyze, visualize, engineer, and govern data programs that turn raw information into business intelligence.

Learn more

AI-First Approach

Intelligent Transformation

IT to AI transformation, AI-native roles, and generative AI programs for enterprise teams.

Learn more

IT delivery models

Flexible models for global execution, cost optimization, and control.

Onshore

  • Local compliance
  • Time zone alignment
  • Cultural compatibility

Nearshore

  • Geographical proximity
  • Time zone compatibility
  • Cost-effective

OCC

  • Global talent access
  • Cost optimization
  • Scalability and flexibility

GCC

  • Centralized operations
  • Cost efficiency
  • Innovation and scalability

COE

  • Best practices
  • Innovation hub
  • Knowledge sharing

Hybrid

  • Flexible and scalable
  • Cost optimization
  • Operational efficiency
